titleStmt.title: Letter from Andrew Philip Magill to Sir Maurice Fitzgerald, 12 April 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Andrew Philip Magill

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: This letter was written by Andrew Philip Magill (1871-1941). Magill was a civil servant and held the position of private secretary for successive chief secretaries of Ireland until his transfer to the Northern Irish Civil Service in 1921. The letter is addressed to the Knight of Kerry, Sir Maurice Fitzgerald (1844-1916). Maurice Fitzgerald was the 20th Knight of Kerry and the 2nd Baronet of Valentia. The letter acknowledges the receipt of a recommendation for the appointment of Sir John Robert O'Connell (1868-1943), a solicitor, to the position of chief crown solicitor sent by Sir Maurice Fitzgerald.

msIdentifier.collection: Chief Secretary's Office Registered Papers; CSO RP/1916/7153/3

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
Copy 12th April, 1916. Dear Sir, I am desired by Mr. Birrell to acknowledge the
receipt of your letter of the 11th instant recommending
Sir John O'Connell for appointment as Chief Crown
Solicitor for Ireland, and to say that Mr. Birrell has
taken note of your recommendation and will see that
Sir John O'Connell's claims are fully considered. Yours faithfully,
(Sd) A.P.M.
Under Secretary
A.P.M.
12/4/16. The Knight Of Kerry,
Buckland,
Faringdon, Berks .
